description_long: This is a black athletic sneaker with a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides and a visible air-cushioned sole. The upper appears to be made of a synthetic mesh material, providing breathability and flexibility, while the midsole and outsole are constructed from translucent and solid rubber for cushioning and durability. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with black laces and a padded tongue, which also displays the Nike logo in white. The heel is slightly raised, and the overall silhouette is streamlined for running or casual urban wear. The outsole is thick and likely provides good traction, though the tread pattern is not visible. The shoe appears to be in good structural condition with minimal visible wear.
description: Black athletic sneaker with a white Nike Swoosh and air-cushioned sole, featuring a mesh upper and standard lacing. The shoe is clean and in good condition.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the white Nike Swoosh and the full length of the air-cushioned sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel structure and a reflective strip at the back.
description_view_2: Right side view with the Nike Swoosh and the air-cushioned sole visible, mirroring the left side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the lacing system, padded tongue with Nike logo, and toe box.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides, white 'NIKE' text on tongue
